powered_by: REFOLD — Rescue-classification, ENM, FPocket, On-the-fly Ligand Design

metadata.mechanism: ER retention / ERAD — misfolded β-glucocerebrosidase fails ER quality control

pocket.pocket_type: TRANSIENT_MISFOLDING — absent in WT, exposes in L444P mutant ensemble

binding_mode.aromatic_stacking: Phenyl π-π with F26 (~4.5 Å T-shaped)
binding_mode.hydrophobic: Pip ring vdW with P3, A1, M49, L51

metadata.mechanism: Class II — TM2 helix disruption collapses TM1-TM2 packing, causes ERAD retention

pocket.target_conformation: MT conformations 1-15 (detection_freq=1.00, persistent across all mutant ensemble frames)
pocket.pocket_type: ICL1-TM2 junction — VX-809 canonical site destroyed (drug=0.003), alternative allosteric pocket exposed

binding_mode.hbond: Carbonyl C=O ← R74 guanidinium NH₂ (~2.7 Å)
binding_mode.hydrophobic_n: Piperazine CH₂ contacts I70, L73 (CH-π, ~3.8 Å)
